+++ head/benchmarks/tsung/Makefile	Tue Jun 25 18:37:55 2013	(r321757)
@@ -1,12 +1,8 @@

-# Whom:		   Sergey Skvortsov <skv@protey.ru>

 # $FreeBSD$

-PORTVERSION=	1.4.2
